calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randy Schmidt for Martha Joan Atkinson.

Mr. Schmidt explained the extent of services provided to support his fee request. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Continued To Nov-10-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested person.

The matter was called and passed. At the second call of the matter, the Court continued the case one week to November 10, 2009 and ordered a notice to appear sent to counsel. Counsel is directed to appear on November 10, 2009 and should be prepared to respond to the Examiner's notes.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

COMPLAINT FOR Claim For Damages, Breach Of Contract, Common Counts, Partition Of Real Property And Fraud
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made.
The court continued the matter to 09/18/2007. The clerk is to notify Counsel to appear at the next hearing or the matter will be taken off calendar. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera
The Court received notice from Mr. Smoot that a Request for Dismissal is being filed. The matter was taken off calendar.

COMPLAINT FOR Claim For Damages, Breach Of Contract, Common Counts, Partition Of Real Property And Fraud
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Sep-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Smoot appearing for plaintiff. Michael Carney specially appearing for Martha Joan Atkinson. Mr. Smoot is trying to locate the process servicer. He is requesting for continuance to do that. Mr. Carney informed the Court that his client did not receive any service. Matter is continued to 9/11.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

COMPLAINT FOR Claim For Damages, Breach Of Contract, Common Counts, Partition Of Real Property And Fraud
Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Continued To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Paul Smoot appearing for plaintiff. POS is defective. Counsel is working to correct it. Matter is continued to 7/25.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
